periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 5am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 76. Southwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Tuesday
periods.short_forecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 5pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 90, with temperatures falling to around 84 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 3 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

periods.name: Tuesday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 73. East wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

periods.name: Wednesday
periods.short_forecast: Chance Rain Showers then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of rain showers before 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 84. Northeast wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
